segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: Morning. Did you sleep okay after that long flight?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Pretty well, actually. I crashed as soon as I showered.

segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: That sounds about right. Help yourself to coffee if you want.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thanks. Is this coffee maker okay to use, or is there a trick to it?

segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: Just fill the water here, put a pod in, and hit the big button.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. Also, which fridge shelf should I stick to? I don't want to crowd anyone's stuff.

segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: Use the lower shelf for now. We usually label anything shared.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. And dishes just go in the dishwasher?

segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: Yep, unless it's full. Then just rinse and leave them on the right.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Easy enough. I'm heading to campus later to figure out paperwork.

segments.speaker: Roommate
segments.text: Good luck. First week is a lot.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yeah, I'm taking it one errand at a time.
